macro.headline: Risk-Off Intensifies as Iran Deadline Looms — Markets Brace for Binary Outcome
bullets: SPY down 0.6% and QQQ shedding 1.2% as geopolitical risk reprices across equities — Strait of Hormuz deadline at 8PM ET tonight is the catalyst everyone's watching.
Oil futures spiking on supply disruption fears; USO up 2.4% as traders hedge energy exposure ahead of the Iran decision.
Growth and momentum names getting hit hardest — TSLA, LMND, and speculative EV/AV plays all under pressure. Cash is not a bad position here.

watchlist.note: Holding 650 support so far — break below opens 640 gap
Tech leading the selloff, 575 is the line in the sand
JPM $145 PT overhang + weak Q1 deliveries; robotaxi June catalyst is the bull case
Ugly tape but fundamentals strong — MS OW $85 PT, earnings May 5
Uber robotaxi partnership $1.25B — 53% growth projected, only green name today
Singapore AV regulatory approval — international expansion unlocked
Drifting lower with sector, but SuperVision pipeline intact
Iran hedge in play — watch for reversal if diplomacy wins

ev_av: RIVN surges on Uber robotaxi partnership announcement — $1.25B deal with 53% projected growth. Biggest AV partnership since Waymo/Jaguar.
PONY.AI receives Singapore autonomous vehicle regulatory approval, opening Southeast Asian market. Stock up 2% on low volume.
Tesla robotaxi event still targeted for June — JPMorgan's $145 bear case PT getting attention but Street consensus remains $280+.
Mobileye (MBLY) SuperVision wins with unnamed OEM rumored — stock not reacting yet, could be a sleeper.
BYD reportedly testing Level 4 autonomy in Shenzhen, adding pressure to Western AV timelines.

opportunity.title: RIVN Under $15 on Uber Deal Day
opportunity.body: Market is sleeping on the Uber partnership magnitude. $1.25B revenue pipeline with 53% growth — if robotaxi narrative catches, this reprices to $20+ fast. Risk: execution and cash burn rate. Position sizing matters here.

opportunity.title: USO Straddle Into Iran Deadline
opportunity.body: Binary event tonight at 8PM ET. Oil either spikes on Hormuz escalation or dumps on diplomatic resolution. Options premiums are elevated but a straddle could capture the move either way. Not for the faint of heart.

trade_setups.action: Hold core, watch robotaxi catalyst in June
Add below $55 if earnings guidance holds
Trim into Iran deadline, reassess Wednesday
Small add on Singapore approval, long-term hold
